title: Probability Calculator - Calculate Event Probability
description: Free probability calculator. Calculate single event probability, combined probability, conditional probability, and permutations/combinations.
keywords: probability calculator, event probability, combinations calculator, permutations calculator
intro: Calculate the probability of events, combinations, and permutations. Enter favorable outcomes and total outcomes.

faq.a: Probability = Number of favorable outcomes / Total number of outcomes. Example: rolling a 6 on a die = 1/6 ≈ 0.167 or 16.7%.

faq.q: What is the difference between permutation and combination?
faq.a: Permutation considers order (nPr = n!/(n-r)!). Combination does not consider order (nCr = n!/(r!(n-r)!)).
